title: Oria Legacy
description: Oria Legacy is a Vanilla+ Minecraft modpack focused on fluid animations, realistic shaders, 3D models, enhanced sounds, and cinematic visuals. It improves world generation and immersion while preserving the core Minecraft gameplay.
body:
![ORIA BANNER](https://i.imgur.com/ac2ps73.png)
𝒮𝓅𝑒𝒸𝒾𝒶𝓁 𝓉𝒽𝒶𝓃𝓀𝓈 𝓉𝑜 𝒜𝓇𝒸𝒽𝟣𝓋𝓌𝒶𝓎𝓈 𝒻𝑜𝓇 𝒷𝑒𝓁𝒾𝑒𝓋𝒾𝓃𝑔 𝒾𝓃 𝓉𝒽𝑒 𝓅𝓇𝑜𝒿𝑒𝒸𝓉

**__Oria Legacy__** is a **Vanilla+ Minecraft Java modpack** designed to bring the world to life.
With **fluid animations**, **immersive visuals**, and **subtle gameplay enhancements**, it transforms Minecraft into a **modern, cinematic experience** while staying true to its vanilla roots.

From **animated players and mobs** to **visible arms**, **smooth GUIs**, **realistic shaders**, **3D models**, **dynamic lighting**, **particles**, and **immersive sound design** — every detail is carefully crafted to feel **natural and alive**.

World generation has been fully enhanced with **unique terrain**, **structures**, and **exploration features** across the Overworld, Nether, and End. Combined with **quality-of-life improvements** and **performance optimizations**, **__Oria Legacy__** delivers a **polished and engaging Vanilla+ experience**.

![FEATURES BANNER](https://i.imgur.com/3XnjCxv.png)
**__Immersive Animations__**  
Fluid player and mob movements, visible arms, **animated items, armor, and weapons**.

**__Advanced Graphics__**  
**Realistic shaders**, **dynamic lighting**, **3D textures**, **visual effects**, and **interactive particles**.

**__Animated GUIs__**  
Modern, smooth, and interactive **interfaces** with seamless transitions.

**__Enhanced Sounds & Ambience__**  
**Immersive environmental audio**, **entity sounds**, and **atmospheric music**.

**__Exploration & World__**  
Expanded terrain generation, **unique structures**, **mini-biomes**, **waypoints**, and **chunk loaders**.

**__Gameplay Improvements__**  
**New items, weapons, armor, backpacks, interactive objects**, and **subtle visual feedback**.

**__Optimizations & Performance__**  
Powered by **Sodium, Lithium, Iris, FerriteCore, Entity Culling**, and more.

![MODS BANNER](https://i.imgur.com/n1nSj9s.png)

| Category | Mods |
|---------|------|
| **Animations & Models** | Fresh Animations · PDB3D’s Blocky Armor Stands · Just Expressions · Better Third Person · I See My Armored Hand · Glowing 3D Armor · 3D Skin Layers · 3D Lights · Just 3D Armors HMI · 3D Harnesses x Fresh Animations · Hold My Items · 2D Projectiles · Item Interactions Mod · Better Minecarts · 3D Trims · Visual: Armor Trims · Actually 3D Stuff |
| **Graphics & Shaders** | BSL Shaders · Subtle Effects · Visual Effects+ · Particle Rain · Particle Interactions · Emissive Pack |
| **GUI & Interface** | Smooth GUI · GUI Revision Dark · FancyMenu · Chat Animation · Animated Typing · Better Statistics Screen · Custom Crosshair Mod · Tiny Item Animations · Blur+ · InvMove |
| **World Generation & Structures** | TerraBlender · Terralith · Moog’s Structure Lib · MVS · MES · MNS · Towns and Towers · Waystones · Chunk Loaders |
| **Gameplay** | Carry On · Backpacks · Farmer’s Delight · More Delight · Zoomify · Essential |
| **Sound & Ambience** | Ambient Environment · AmbientSounds · Constant Music · Sound Physics Remastered · Simple Voice Chat · ESF |
| **Utilities & Libraries** | SuperMartijn642 Core & Config Lib · Forge Config API Port · YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) · Fabric API · Architectury API · TCDCommons API · MaLiLib · Mod Menu · Text Placeholder API · LibJF |
| **Decoration & Building** | Macaw’s Furniture · Enhanced Flower Pots · Too Many Paintings |
| **Exploration & Navigation** | Xaero’s World Map · Nature’s Compass |
| **Performance & Optimization** | Sodium · Sodium Extra · Lithium · Entity Culling · BadOptimizations · ImmediatelyFast · FerriteCore · Iris Shaders |

![SOON BANNER](https://i.imgur.com/mWkWPB3.png)
**__Just Enought Items__**
